prompt.content: Based on Anthony Porter's personnel file and the available legal research, what is SBP's strongest argument in defense of a lawsuit by Anthony Porter under Section 11(c) of the Occupational Safety and Health Act (OSH Act), 29 U.S.C. §660(c)?

messages.content: States that SBP's strongest argument is that there is no private right of action under section 11(c) of OSHA.

golden_responses.golden_text_response: SBP's strongest argument is that there is no private right of action under section 11(c) of OSHA.
